contents.text:
Now that you’ve made it back here, I’ll explain how to unlock the Player Hub. Inside the house on the island, you’ll find a group objective; compressed logs must be turned in for this objective.
 
 Group objectives are tasks that must be completed server-wide. This allows players who join later to benefit from those who have already gained a lot of experience or spend a lot of time online. Group objectives always scale with the number of players who have joined the game.
 
Once the group objective in the house is completed, a ship with a pilot will dock at the back of the pier; the pilot will then help you enter the Player Hub.
[WIP] Some texts and features are still in development and will be revised during the testing phase.
